LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Implant_Specialis: [PAWN_nameDef] is a doctor from the utopian world, engaged in the design of implants.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cyber_Developer.d: [PAWN_nameDef] creates advanced cybernetic prostheses in the factory of the utopian world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Biohacker.title: Biohacker
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Biohacker.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in hacking cybernetic implants by invading the software part.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Agrocybernetic.de: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in breeding perfect crops in a utopian world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cyber_Biologist.d: [PAWN_nameDef] deduces previously unseen animals from biological material in a utopian world.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cybersoldier.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] fights for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} galactic empire, using modern technology and combat stimulants.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_ThreeD_Engineer.d: [PAWN_nameDef] designs and creates 3D models for the entertainment industry.
[PAWN_nameDef] works on a space station, regulating the weather on a utopian planet.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drone_Operator.de: [PAWN_nameDef] is setting up drones that do simple jobs on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} planet.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drone_Developer.d: [PAWN_nameDef] designs and develops small robots and drones that later serve for peaceful and military purposes.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drone_Pilot.title: Drone pilot
Pilot
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Drone_Pilot.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is the pilot of the battle drone of the galactic empire.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Nano_Engineer.des: [PAWN_nameDef] designs chips and processors in a galactic empire factory.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Neurosurgeon.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] performs brain surgery, implanting implants and adjusting them.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Cosmobiologist.de: [PAWN_nameDef] is engaged in terraforming planets and populating them with plants.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Space_Miner.title: Space miner
Miner
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Space_Miner.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] was engaged in the excavation of minerals in asteroids.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bioethics.title: Bioethics
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Bioethics.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] has dealt with ethical issues in a rapidly evolving biotechnology and implant environment.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Space_Pirate.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] trades in robbery and murder within {PAWN_gender ? his : her} star system.
[PAWN_nameDef] builds and designs enormous aircraft called airships.
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rebel_Space.title: Space rebel
Rebel
LanguageData.UB_Cybranian_Adulthood_Rebel_Space.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] is part of a small anarchist organization that seeks to return to the past.
